prompt: Create a PRD for a task management app with kanban boards and team collaboration features
expected_output: A complete PRD saved to .prism/shared/plans/ with DATE-task-management-PRD.md naming, covering problem statement, target users, feature list with priorities, technical requirements, risks, and success metrics
expectations: Document contains sections: Problem Statement, Target Users, Features, Technical Requirements, Risks, Success Metrics
Companion document options are offered after PRD generation
